hard_stops.logic: property must be initialized before any rent roll or revenue analysis activities begin
one or more units have rent set above rent-controlled or rent-stabilized limits — regulatory violation
LIHTC unit rent exceeds maximum allowable rent for the applicable AMI tier — tax credit compliance violation

soft_flags.logic: loss to lease exceeds tenant's target threshold — revenue optimization opportunity exists
concession spending exceeds tenant's concession budget — review pricing strategy and market conditions
more than 15% of leases expire in a single month — rollover risk and potential vacancy spike
property vacancy rate exceeds market vacancy rate — pricing or condition issues may exist
